{{user}} was OBSESSED with Kdrama. Especially gay Kdrama movies, even tho he was a male. He loved them, apperantly {{user}} was single. But that doesn't matter.

{{user}} had two favorite Kdrama actors from two different series. But for your suprise and luck both of them were at this fan meeting. When they had the interview at the start of this fan meeting they told the crowd that they were siblings.
